sections.sectionTitle: Nate leh Ama Thu-ah Pasian' Minthan'na

verses.text: Vantung in Pasian' minthan'na gen a, vanpi in ama nasepna taangko hi
Nisimin thu gengen a, zan simin theihtelna pulaklak hi
Pauna leh kammal omlo a, amau' aw kizalo hi
Ahih hangin a aw uh leitung khempeuhah kizel a, a kammal uh leimong dongah a tung hi. Amau' sungah ni-a' ding omna khat bawl khin a
a innsung pan a hong pusuak zi pi tangval tawh ahi zongin, lungtaii takin tai ding a kipan mi thahat khat tawh ahi zongin a kibang hi
Ama suahna van mong pan hi a, mong khat dongin pai a, ama satna panin a kiliah thei bangmah omlo hi
Topa' thu kicing a, nuntakna a thaksuaksak hi. Topa' teci pan'na hi takpi a, mi pillote pilsak hi
Topa' thuhilhte man a, lungsim nuamsak hi. Topa' thupiakna siang a, mitte vaksak hi
Topa a kizahtakna siang a, kip tawntung hi. Topa' ngeina kipte thuman a, a vekin kituakin man kim hi
Kham sangin ahi zongin kham hoihpen sang ahi zongin tuate deihhuaizaw a, khuaizu leh khuailuzu taakte sangin zong khumzaw lai hi
Tua thamloin tuate' hangin a thanempa in thuphawkna ngah a, tuate zuihna-ah noptuamna lian a om hi
Ahih hangin kua in ama khialhnate mukhia theitawm ahi hiam? Theihloh manin khialhna panin kei hong siangsak hi
Mawh kaltangnate panin zong na nasempa hong kem in la, tuate keima tungah hong uksak kei in! Tua ciangin kei ka kawkbaang kei ding a, mawhna liante panin ka siang ding hi
Topa, ka belh suangpi leh keimah hong tankhiapa aw, ka kammal leh ka lungsim ngaihsutnate nangma muhna-ah a san'huai suaksak ta in!
